title: Run CI workflow on pull requests targeting develop as well as main

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updating GitHub Actions trigger config so CI runs for PRs against develop and main. Will patch .github/workflows/ci.yml and validate YAML parse.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched .github/workflows/ci.yml to remove pull_request branch filter so CI runs on all PR targets; validated YAML parse locally.
